title: Attorney fees
doc_html:
§1270.37. Attorney fees

            If the commission's decision on nonconformity is appealed by either party, the court may award reasonable attorney fees to the prevailing party on appeal.

            Acts 2021, No. 220, §1.
doc_text:
§1270.37.  Attorney fees
If the commission's decision on nonconformity is appealed by either party, the court
may award reasonable attorney fees to the prevailing party on appeal.
Acts 2021, No. 220, §1.
